p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[G, G](g.mul)
not is_injective_fn[G, G](g.mul) or forall(x0: G, x1: G) { g * x1 != g * x0 or x1 = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: G) { not is_injective_fn[G, G](g.mul) or forall(x1: G) { g * x0 != g * x1 or x0 = x1 } = true })
(forall(x0: G, x1: G) { not (g * x0 = g * x1 and x0 != x1) or not is_injective_fn[G, G](g.mul) })
(forall(x0: G, x1: G) { not is_injective_fn[G, G](g.mul) or g * x0 != g * x1 or x0 = x1 })

exists(k0: G, k1: G) { g * k1 = g * k0 and k1 != k0 } or is_injective_fn[G, G](g.mul)

let w0: G satisfy { exists(k2: G) { g * k2 = g * w0 and k2 != w0 } }
let w1: G satisfy { g * w0 = g * w1 and w0 != w1 }
g * w1 = g * w0
let w2: G satisfy { g * w0 = g * w2 and w0 != w2 }
g * w2 = g * w0
g * w2 = g * w0
function(x0: G, x1: G) { g * x0 != g * x1 or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)

(forall(x0: G) { not is_injective_fn[G, G](function(x1: G) { x1 * g }) or forall(x2: G) { x0 * g != x2 * g or x0 = x2 } = true })

let w0: G satisfy { exists(k2: G) { k2 * g = w0 * g and k2 != w0 } }
let w1: G satisfy { w1 * g = w0 * g and w1 != w0 }
w1 * g = w0 * g
let w2: G satisfy { w2 * g = w0 * g and w2 != w0 }
w2 * g = w0 * g
function(x0: G) { x0 * g }(w0) = function(x1: G) { x1 * g }(w2) and w0 != w2

function(x0: G, x1: G) { x0 * g != x1 * g or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: Embedding[G, G]) { Embedding.new[G, G](function(x0: G) { g * x0 }) = Option.some(k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { Embedding.constraint[T0, T1](x0) = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[G, G](g.mul)
